name: bigquery_qualify_rewrites_to_subquery
input: SELECT * FROM t QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a ORDER BY b) = 1;
expected: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a ORDER BY b NULLS FIRST) AS _w FROM t) AS _t WHERE _w = 1

name: oracle_match_recognize_is_preserved
input: SELECT * FROM t MATCH_RECOGNIZE (PARTITION BY x ORDER BY y MEASURES a AS m PATTERN (A) DEFINE A AS 1 = 1);
expected: SELECT * FROM t MATCH_RECOGNIZE (PARTITION BY x ORDER BY y MEASURES a AS m PATTERN (A) DEFINE A AS 1 = 1)
